summary: Unmerged WIP PR adding several matched or partially typed functions across the mn diagram files and tightening related menu headers. The author described it as work-in-progress for cleaning up and gathering matched functions, then closed it to reorganize with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3. Main value is evidence of menu-diagram matching approaches: replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete prototypes, adding baselib forward declarations, using small dummy locals and pointer arithmetic to satisfy codegen, and wiring GObj/JObj/SisLib cleanup and animation-end callbacks.

key_files.reason: Largest implementation change; replaces multiple placeholder stubs with matched C for stat totals, navigation helpers, SIS cleanup, animation/GObj lifecycle, and joint object setup.
Converts many diagram APIs from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete return and parameter types, including HSD_GObj signatures.
Adds first substantive mndiagram2 implementations including animation-end GObj unlink, SIS/free cleanup, and diagram2 flow initialization.
Introduces a proper header guard, baselib forward include, and prototypes for the new mndiagram2 functions.
Adds fn_80246E04 animation-end unlink callback using mn_8022ED6C and existing mnDiagram3 animation table.
Adds address-commented prototype for fn_80246E04 and preserves fn_80246F0C.
Tightens many name-entry function prototypes, supporting mndiagram use of GetNameText and persistent name data.
Tightens menu-rule prototypes from placeholder signatures to typed HSD_GObj/u8/s32/void signatures.
Adds extern for mnDiagram_803EE774 animation-loop data.
Minor prototype/header adjustment noted in changed files; diff excerpt provides limited detail.

what_changed: Implemented mnDiagram_8023EA54 as a language-dependent threshold check using lbLang_IsSavedLanguageUS, returning true above 0x274A6 for US saved language and above 0x186A0 otherwise.

Implemented stat aggregation helpers GetNameTotalKOs, GetNameTotalFalls, GetFighterTotalKOs, and GetFighterTotalFalls using GetPersistentNameData/GetPersistentFighterData, GetNameText, and mn_8022E950 filtering.
Implemented mnDiagram_8023F334 to write decimal digits for an integer using mn_8022EB78 and mn_8022EB24, then terminate with mnDiagram_804D4FA4.

Implemented navigation helpers mnDiagram_8023F3A8, mnDiagram_8023F45C, and mnDiagram_8023F4CC to scan backward/forward to the previous valid name or fighter entry, returning the original index when none is found.
Implemented mnDiagram_8023FDD8 to count valid fighters over the 0x19 fighter range with mn_8022E950.
Implemented fn_80240B18 cleanup over object fields at offsets 0x38 through 0x48, freeing SIS entries with HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4 before HSD_Free.

Implemented fn_80241AE8 and mndiagram2/mndiagram3 equivalents as animation-loop callbacks that call mn_8022ED6C and unlink the GObj via HSD_GObjPLink_80390228 when the animation reaches its end frame.
Implemented mnDiagram_802433AC to create a GObj, load a joint from mnDiagram_804A0814, attach it with HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, set up GX link, and install fn_80243038 as a proc.

Implemented mndiagram2 functions fn_80244D20, fn_80245028, and mnDiagram2_802453B0, including MenuFlow initialization and direct manipulation of a GObj byte at offset 0xD using HSD_GObj_804D783C bits.
Updated mndiagram.h, mnmainrule.h, mnname.h, mndiagram2.h, and mndiagram3.h to replace many placeholder signatures with concrete return types and parameters.
The PR was closed unmerged; author said they would reorganize it with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3.
smart_moves: Converted broad placeholder prototypes into concrete signatures, which makes downstream matching easier and reduces repeated UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS ambiguity.
Used baselib forward declarations in headers for HSD_GObj/HSD_JObj-style types rather than forcing heavier includes into public headers.
Kept address comments next to prototypes, preserving decomp navigation/searchability while refining types.
Matched cleanup functions by explicitly checking each possible SIS pointer field for NULL before freeing and then freeing the parent allocation.

Reused the same animation-end callback pattern across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3: fetch user data from gobj + 0x2C, fetch jobj from data + 0x0C, call mn_8022ED6C, compare against end frame, then unlink the object.
Used local dummy arrays/variables and explicit casts/pointer arithmetic where needed, suggesting codegen-sensitive matching rather than only semantic cleanup.
Introduced a temporary GetNameText_u8 macro alias to reconcile a u8-call-site signature with the existing GetNameText naming in a localized part of mndiagram.c.
decomp_lessons: For menu modules, header work can be as important as C bodies: replacing placeholder signatures exposes real dependencies and enables other files to match.
When matching GObj callbacks, preserve raw offset access if the backing struct is not yet known; naming the pattern is useful, but inventing a struct too early could destabilize matches.

Animation table typing may vary by confidence: mndiagram.static.h used extern f32 mnDiagram_803EE774[], while mndiagram2 used an AnimLoopSettings extern and mndiagram3 used a two-f32 array. Future work should normalize only when evidence is strong.
Menu cleanup routines often free several optional SIS handles before the container; this pattern should be reused for similarly shaped menu data blocks.
Index-scanning helpers for names/fighters return the original index if no valid previous/next entry exists; this behavior matters for UI navigation matching.
Persistent stat functions distinguish name-indexed and fighter-indexed storage and use u16 offsets, with loops bounded by 0x78 for names and 0x19 for fighters.
Because this PR was intentionally closed for reorganization, treat its code as useful matching evidence but not merged project truth.
naming_conventions: Address-based names are retained for unknown functions: mnDiagram_8023EA54, fn_80240B18, mnDiagram2_802453B0, fn_80246E04.

User-facing/stat helper names use descriptive PascalCase-style verbs already present in the project: GetNameTotalKOs, GetNameTotalFalls, GetFighterTotalKOs, GetFighterTotalFalls, GetHitPercentage, GetPlayPercentage.
Module globals use module prefix plus address: mnDiagram_804A0750, mnDiagram_804A076C, mnDiagram_803EE774, mnDiagram2_803EEB60, mnDiagram3_803EEC10.
Headers keep address comments in the form /* 23EA54 */ before prototypes.
Baselib object types are exposed as HSD_GObj* and HSD_JObj* where known; otherwise void* is left in place.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inserted dummy stack locals such as s32 dummy[4], s32 dummy[8], and int dummy to influence stack layout/codegen.
Used explicit byte pointer arithmetic for structure fields and arrays, e.g. gobj + 0x2C, data + 0x0C, arg0 + 0x38, and byte mutation at gobj + 0xD.
Used u8 casts and masked field_index with 0xFF to force narrow argument behavior.
Represented stat table entries as u16 loads from computed offsets, matching likely halfword access in assembly.
Used do/while decrement/increment loops for previous/next selection helpers to match control flow and return original index fallback.
Added local extern declarations for unresolved symbols instead of broad header churn where dependencies were not yet fully modeled.
Used a localized macro alias, #define GetNameText GetNameText_u8, then #undef, to control symbol/signature behavior without renaming the public API.

review_feedback.text: Author closed the PR to reorganize it with more matches across mndiagram, mndiagram2, and mndiagram3.
No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs by itsgrimetime that reorganized or merged mndiagram, mndiagram2, or mndiagram3 matches after PR #2080.
Search for merged implementations of fn_80240B18, fn_80241AE8, fn_80244D20, fn_80245028, mnDiagram2_802453B0, and fn_80246E04 to compare final signatures.
Check whether mnDiagram_803EE774, mnDiagram2_803EEB60, and mnDiagram3_803EEC10 were later standardized as AnimLoopSettings or f32 arrays.
Look for reviewer guidance in later mn header PRs about replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and using baselib forward declarations.
Verify final naming and signatures for GetNameText_u8/GetNameText and persistent name/fighter stat helpers.
